tldr: Two ads (#2 and #3) share identical body copy and the OHT x LIGHTSUM drop runs as a near-exact dupe across two SKUs — meaning 4 of 5 primary ads are riding repeated text. Expect CPM lift within 7-10 days as Meta's frequency caps tighten on these duplicate creatives.

benchmark.context: OHTNYC is fatiguing roughly 2x faster than the jewelry/streetwear category median. The driver isn't volume — it's repetition: the same 'Be unapologetically you' and 'From CUBE to cosmos' blocks appear across multiple active ads.

ads.headline: Soft Enough for Daily. Sharp Enough to Feel Like You
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ THE USUAL ♡⊹˚₊ Not the jewelry you save for "someday." The ones you live in, grocery runs, late nights, everything between. Soft, sharp, and oht to the core ♡ Meet the usual, your everyday, upgraded ☁︎⚙︎☆
drivers: Headline + body re-runs verbatim on at least 2 other active placements (heart-bow-necklace, shooting-star-earrings)
Heavy decorative glyphs (₊˚⊹♡☁︎⚙︎☆) that scrolled audiences now pattern-recognize as 'OHT ad' before reading
Strong everyday-wear angle but no proof — no UGC, no wear-test, no creator voice backing the claim

ads.headline: Layered to perfection
ads.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
drivers: Body copy is a 100% character-for-character duplicate of Ad #3 — same LP too (transparent-heart-charm-necklace)
Generic empowerment language ('unapologetically you', 'fearlessly') reads like brand boilerplate, not OHT's downtown NYC voice
No product specificity — never names the necklace, the material, or why it layers

ads.headline: For Your Weekly Jewelry Rotation
ads.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
drivers: Identical body to Ad #2 AND identical landing page — Meta is almost certainly suppressing one of the two for redundancy
Headline 'Weekly Jewelry Rotation' is the strongest concept in the rotation but is buried under recycled body copy
Zero differentiation between this ad and #2 from the user's POV — wasted impression budget

ads.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
drivers: Same headline + body as Ad #5, only the LP SKU changes (cube-dice-necklace vs supernova-necklace)
Collab angle (LIGHTSUM/CUBE) is the freshest hook in the account — but it's stretched across 2 ads instead of 2 distinct angles
'Limited drop' urgency is stated but never quantified (no end date, no unit count)

ads.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
drivers: Verbatim duplicate of Ad #4 with only the destination product swapped
Collab equity is real but this twin-ad setup splits learnings across two ad IDs instead of consolidating signal
No 'why this collab' story — fans of LIGHTSUM aren't told what makes the supernova piece different from the cube dice piece

ads_compact.headline: Steal Hearts with He♡rt Heist
ads_compact.body: This is what falling in love looks like. He♡rt Heist blends romance with edge: crystal-lit hearts, love-locked chains, surgical steel that shines...

ads_compact.headline: Level Up Your Fit with K-pop Style Jewelry
ads_compact.body: Looking for Y2K jewelry that fits your vibe and your fit? We got you. 💿💅 The Y2K baddie aesthetic is officially back...

ads_compact.headline: Soft Enough for Daily. Sharp Enough to Feel Like You
ads_compact.body: THE USUAL — repeated across 3+ ads with different LPs (shooting-star-earrings, heart-bow-necklace)

ads_compact.headline: Steal Hearts This Valentine's ♡ He♡rt Heist
ads_compact.body: Not just Valentine's jewelry — a He♡rt Heist. Crystal hearts, romantic motifs, and that signature Y2K sparkle...

ad_to_scale.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ad_to_scale.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage.
ad_to_scale.why: It's the only ad in rotation with a proprietary hook (the LIGHTSUM collab) that competitors literally cannot copy. K-pop fan audiences run hot on Meta and convert on scarcity. Pause Ad #5 (its twin), consolidate spend onto #4 with a real end-date in the copy, and you'll see CTR lift inside 72 hours.

ad_to_kill.headline: For Your Weekly Jewelry Rotation
ad_to_kill.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
ad_to_kill.why: Body copy is a verbatim duplicate of Ad #2 pointing to the same landing page — Meta is splitting signal between two near-identical creatives. The headline 'Weekly Jewelry Rotation' is actually the better hook of the two, so kill #3 and rebuild the headline onto a fresh body that names the product.

concepts.primary_text: ₊˚⊹♡ THE ROTATION ♡⊹˚₊ Monday it's the shooting star. Friday it's the heart heist. Sunday it's stacked. Real OHT girls don't pick one — they rotate. Surgical steel means you can sweat in it, sleep in it, shower in it. Built for the week, not the occasion ☁︎⚙︎☆ Your rotation starts at ohtnyc.com
concepts.visual_direction: Fast-cut POV: hand opening a jewelry tray Mon-Sun, each day a different OHT piece going on with the outfit (subway fit, gym fit, going-out fit, WFH fit). Shot in NYC apartment + street.
concepts.fills_gap: Zero video/UGC currently in rotation — every primary ad is static-style copy. Also activates the 'Weekly Rotation' headline that's wasted on Ad #3.

concepts.hook: How a downtown necklace gets made.
concepts.primary_text: Surgical steel doesn't tarnish in the rain on Canal St. We tested. ☁︎ Every OHT piece starts as a sketch in a Lower East Side studio and ends on your collarbone — no factory dropship, no Alibaba reskins. Meet the usual, made the OHT way ♡⊹˚₊ Tap through to see the build.
concepts.visual_direction: Frame 1: sketch on paper. Frame 2: CAD render. Frame 3: raw steel. Frame 4: polishing. Frame 5: packaging in OHT mailer. Frame 6: worn on model in NYC.
concepts.fills_gap: Nothing in rotation explains *why OHT vs Shein jewelry*. Craft + NYC origin is a moat the brand owns but never shows.

concepts.hook: What our girls are wearing this week.
concepts.primary_text: Tagged on IG this week ♡⊹˚₊ The Heart Heist on a first date. The Shooting Stars on a 6am flight. The OHT x LIGHTSUM cube necklace at the show. You don't need permission to be the main character — you just need the jewelry the main characters are already wearing ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Shop the most-tagged at ohtnyc.com
concepts.visual_direction: 9-up grid of real customer/creator photos with @handles, each piece circled. OHT logo bottom right. Looks like an IG screenshot, not a polished ad.
concepts.fills_gap: No social proof anywhere in current rotation — every ad is brand-voice monologue. Also breaks the visual sameness of glyph-heavy product copy.

unlocks: Recover ~30-40% of impressions currently wasted on duplicate Ad #2/#3 split
Extend LIGHTSUM collab window by consolidating Ads #4/#5 into one scaled creative
Add the 3 missing creative formats (UGC video, craft carousel, social proof) the account has zero of
Push average days-until-fatigue from ~11 toward category median of 22

next_step.urgency: Ads #2 and #3 hit critical fatigue inside 5 days — the LIGHTSUM twins follow ~10 days after.
next_step.headline: Let's get the kill list shipped before next weekend
next_step.body: 30 minutes — I'll walk you through which duplicates to pause first, how to rebuild the 'Weekly Rotation' hook, and the shoot list for the 3 replacement concepts. You leave with a sequenced action plan, not homework.

method_note: Fatigue scores are modeled from copy repetition, hook diversity, format mix, and category benchmarks across the live Meta Ad Library scrape — not from your account-level CPM/CTR data, which would sharpen the forecast further.
